transcript:
CALLER: Hello, main puchna chahta tha ki kya aap log cash payment accept karte ho ya sirf digital hi hai?
AGENT: Haan, hum dono accept karte hain — cash bhi aur digital bhi. Billing counter par aap cash, UPI, debit ya credit card se payment kar sakte hain.
CALLER: Achha. Aur kya koi surcharge hai card pe?
AGENT: Credit card par 1.5% convenience charge lagta hai. UPI aur debit card par koi extra charge nahin hai.
CALLER: Oh okay. Main UPI se dene ki koshish karunga. Mera naam Rithvik Nair hai, mujhe apna outstanding balance jaanna tha.
AGENT: Ji Mr. Nair. Aapka registered number?
CALLER: 9911223344.
AGENT: Mr. Rithvik Nair ka balance hai ₹3,800 — ek OPD visit aur ek ultrasound ke liye. UPI ID hai sunriseclinic@axisbank.
CALLER: Done, main abhi pay karta hoon.
AGENT: Shukriya Mr. Nair. Payment ke baad screenshot WhatsApp kar dijiye 9876543200 par, confirmation mil jaayegi.
